title: Robust data-full-text test assertions using html.escape

steps.description: Add `import html`; rewrite the two `data-full-text` assertions (lines 95 and 241) in tests/dashboard/test_i00067_recent_activity_truncation.py to wrap the fixture in html.escape(..., quote=True) so the assertion matches Jinja2's auto-escaped output regardless of fixture content
Per-agent review of S01 — verify only the two flagged assertions changed, the new `import html` is placed correctly, and existing tests still pass
Global cross-step review — confirm CR scope was honored (test-file only), no production code touched, and assertion semantics correctly mirror Jinja2 attribute escaping
